---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement
title: '[FEATURE] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## What feature are you suggesting?
A clear description of what you want to add.

## Why is this useful?
How does this improve FutureMe for users?

## Proposed solution
How would you implement this? (optional)

## Alternatives considered
Any other approaches you thought of?

## Additional context
Screenshots, mockups, or examples if any.
